author: codex-agent

patch.value: Delivery epic for background linked-test orchestration and test-result tracking on item records.
Background linked-test service and item result tracking
Implement opt-in background execution and lifecycle management for pm test/test-all plus configurable persistence of test outcomes to PM items.
Background test orchestration lifecycle commands are available with duplicate prevention; test result tracking is configurable and persisted safely; docs/contracts/tests remain release-ready.
Background runs can be managed and optionally tracked on items.
Improves agent/operator ergonomics without changing default foreground behavior.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10 --json; pm search background test service linked tests --limit 20 --json; pm search record test results to pm items --limit 20 --json; pm list-open --limit 50 --json; pm list-in-progress --limit 50 --json; pm list-blocked --limit 50 --json. Net-new because no active item delivers background lifecycle management plus item-level test-result tracking.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Parent lineage for background test service and configurable PM item test-result tracking.
